subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 09 (Tablet to the ninth Letter of the Living)
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He before Whom all that dwell in the heavens and on earth, and whatsoever lieth between them, bow down in adoration. Say: All shall return unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الاظهر المبین. سبحان الذی یخضع له من فی السموات و الأرض و ما بینهما قل کل الی الله یقلبون
subcodes.subjects: @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
